exitCodeReference.title: General command failure
exitCodeReference.summary: The command reported a generic failure. Review the output above for the specific WGS Extract or tool error.

exitCodeReference.title: Command-line usage error
exitCodeReference.summary: The command arguments were not accepted. Check required inputs, paths, and selected options before running again.

exitCodeReference.title: Command found but not executable
exitCodeReference.summary: The command or script exists but could not be executed. Check file permissions and whether setup completed successfully.

exitCodeReference.title: Command not found
exitCodeReference.summary: The command runner could not find the executable. Run setup for this bundle and verify the persistent runtime workspace exists.

exitCodeReference.title: Command cancelled
exitCodeReference.summary: The command was interrupted by the user. Any partial output or temporary files may need to be cleaned up before retrying.
